channel.title: IBD LitMonitor - Pathogenesis & Basic Science
channel.description: IBD literature monitoring: Pathogenesis & Basic Science

item.title: Oridonin ameliorates ulcerative colitis by regulating the PI3K/AKT/mTOR signaling pathway to activate autophagy.
item.description: International journal of molecular medicine - The present study aimed to investigate the therapeutic effects and underlying mechanism of oridonin (ORI) in ulcerative colitis (UC) using the lipopolysaccharide (LPS)‑induced macrophage inflammato...

item.title: An Attention-Enhanced ViT-HLNN Hybrid Ensemble Framework for Multi-Class Gastrointestinal Disease Classification.
item.description: Scientific reports - Gastrointestinal (GI) diseases such as polyps, esophagitis, and ulcerative colitis pose significant diagnostic challenges due to subtle visual patterns. Early, accurate, and scalable diagnostic too...

item.title: Betulinic Acid Enema Alleviates Colitis by Targeting Vitamin D Receptor to Protect the Intestinal Mucosal Barrier and Modulate Mucosa-Associated Microbiota.
item.description: Phytotherapy research : PTR - Ulcerative colitis (UC) is a chronic inflammatory disease of the colon with limited effectiveness and safety of current drug therapies. Betulinic acid (BA) is a naturally occurring pentacyclic trit...

item.title: Timing-dependent protective and therapeutic effects of ethyl pyruvate in trinitrobenzene sulfonic acid-induced experimental colitis.
item.description: Experimental physiology - Ulcerative colitis (UC) involves excessive inflammation, extracellular matrix remodelling and oxidative stress. Ethyl pyruvate (EP) exhibits anti-inflammatory effects, but the comparative efficacy ...

item.title: Corrigendum to "Oleanolic acid 28-O-β-D-glucopyranoside alleviates TNBS-induced ulcerative colitis in rat by regulating Nrf2/x-CT/GPX4-mediated ferroptosis" [Journal of Ethnopharmacology 353 (2025) 120369].

Enhancing the Efficacy of Ulcerative Colitis Treatment by Inhibiting LCN2-Mediated Pyroptosis Through Traditional Processing Techniques: With the rhizome of Atractylodes macrocephala Koidz. as an Example.
item.description: Journal of ethnopharmacology - Atractylodes Macrocephala Rhizome (AMR), the dried rhizome of Atractylodes macrocephala Koidz (family Asteraceae), is a commonly used Chinese herbal medicine for treating ulcerative colitis (UC) an...

item.title: Noninvasive Assessment of Colitis Activity by Targeted Imaging of Neutrophil Elastase with [68Ga]Ga-POL6014.
item.description: Molecular pharmaceutics - Effective management of IBD necessitates ongoing evaluation of disease activity. Molecular imaging of neutrophil elastase (NE) could address this urgent need as it mechanistically targets the early...

item.title: TREM-1-dependent macrophage infiltration mediates visceral hypersensitivity via vlPAG GABAergic neuron activation in a mouse model of inflammatory bowel disease.
item.description: Cellular & molecular biology letters - Visceral pain is a common symptom of inflammatory bowel disease (IBD). Although triggering receptor expressed on myeloid cells-1 (TREM-1) has been shown to induce infiltration of peripheral immune ...
